message:
fix: resolve TypeScript type errors for exactOptionalPropertyTypes

- Update z.record() calls to use 2-arg form for Zod v4 compatibility
- Add | undefined to optional interface properties in shared types
- Fix Object.entries type issues by adding explicit type narrowing
- Update component props to accept undefined values
- Fix conditional property assignments to avoid undefined assignment

Production code typecheck passes; test-only errors remain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
